topStories.title: Trump urges Japan to help in Strait of Hormuz as Pentagon seeks more funding for Iran war
topStories.description: Japan joined five European countries on Thursday saying they are ready "to contribute to appropriate efforts to ensure safe passage through" the Strait of Hormuz, but only after the fighting ends. It comes as the Pentagon seeks about $200 billion to fund the Iran war. Nancy Cordes reports.

topStories.description: The vote by the U.S. Commission of Fine Arts, whose members are supporters of the president and were appointed by him earlier this year, was without objection.

dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump joked about Pearl Harbor in a meeting Thursday with the Japanese prime minister.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s hand-picked panel votes to put his face on a U.S. gold coin
dailyNews.description: The proposal had been rejected by members of a separate federal coin committee — and panned by former member Kareem Abdul-Jabbar.
